rows.body:
Reese Morgan,

Following up on the question your team asked: How do I see which workspace caused a usage overage?

That question points to a possible FAQ gap.

FineTune Lab can map this question against your help center and identify whether an answer is missing or hard to find. See how the audit works.

rows.subject: Follow-up: usage overage question

rows.body:
Reese Morgan,

Your team asked: How do I see which workspace caused a usage overage?

That question points to a possible FAQ gap.

FineTune Lab can map this question against your help center and identify whether an answer is missing or hard to find. See how the audit works.
